reviews.author: Priyanka
reviews.review_body: Abuse behind closed doors. There is literal bullying and physical bullying going on and when you raise this issue to faculty members they laugh at you and shun you. My mental health is in ruin here. Many of my other friends are depressed and suicidal because they are facing the same situation. This is a prison we unknowingly paid a very high amount to enter and now we are stuck.

reviews.author: Mrityunjay Tiwary
reviews.review_body: This is the best school in the whole world. Children from all over the country and abroad come here to study.

reviews.author: Çüen
reviews.review_body: My husband was bullied at the school and forced to drop out in his last year right before graduating. We are now almost in our thirties and he is still dealing with the psychological aftermath.  Guess this is what they call education.

reviews.review_body: best school in brazil. hakuna matata. Best school in universe. many aliens study here i encountered many safed people. 5 staar

reviews.author: Saksham Goyal
reviews.review_body:
The Woodstock Inn is like a cozy retreat with views that just lift your spirits. The staff there are super friendly and always ready to help, making you feel right at home. Plus, the attention to detail in the rooms and common areas shows great managerial care. And let's not forget the delicious food – it's a culinary delight that will leave you wanting more!
If you seek a welcoming place with breathtaking views, attentive staff, and delectable cuisine, the Woodstock Inn is the ultimate destination!
And being close to the market makes exploring the area a breeze, adding to the overall charm of this wonderful place!

reviews.review_body: The school is very good and also the teachers .
